intent: Write a piece on 'what /f/askreddit threads reveal about an everyday phenomenon' — pick one theme surfaced by the forum (fear, memory, habit). You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/askreddit AND /f/AskMen for at least 4 top posts on your chosen theme. Collect title, score, comment count. (2) Wikipedia — open the article on the corresponding psychological or social concept and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) state the theme and the Wikipedia definition, (b) present 4 community voices clustered by pattern, (c) analyze overlap or divergence with the formal concept, (d) close with a one-paragraph takeaway. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Reddit (askreddit + AskMen) + Wikipedia. Theme selection drives open-ended synthesis.
